notes: Core decision substrate. Staleness=90d matches operator-default per I76 P3 axis 2 ratify. External-handoff audience because future AIC engagements may quote decisions in handoff packs (J-AD post-NDA pattern per akos-adviser-engagement.mdc).

Methodology checkpoint surface per MADEIRA_MODE_PARITY §Methodology Mode L160. Tighter staleness (30d) because methodology candidates have shorter shelf life than ratified decisions before recall/re-frame.

Operator's async thought capture during active wave. Drained at wave boundary; no staleness check — wave-boundary discipline is the freshness gate. Path-pattern is wave-specific (initiative's planning folder).

Initiative lifecycle substrate. Staleness=60d (between decision-register's 90d and logic-change-log's 30d) because initiative status flips meaningfully across that window (active→closed mid-quarter is common).

Per-initiative file-change ledger per akos-planning-traceability.mdc §Per-initiative file-changes CSV. On-demand read (not every-session) because rows are append-only audit trail, not active read substrate. No staleness — every row carries its own commit_date so staleness is per-row not per-file.

Per akos-conflict-surfacing-and-blocker-trackers.mdc §Blocker-tracker file shape. 3 active instances at mint (i74/i75/i83). Snapshot-shape (not active read substrate); no staleness — next-review trigger lives inside each tracker.

Phase plan SSOT per akos-planning-traceability.mdc. No staleness — frontmatter `last_review` is per-row signal; the doctrine is the plan-quality bar enforcement.
Per akos-agent-checkpoint-discipline.mdc §Operator pause point contract. Mandatory for canonical-CSV gates / trademark / public-prose. Snapshot of phase state at hand-off moment.

Always-applied methodology surface (10 rules currently). Auto-injected every session per system prompt. Letta MemGPT 'core memory' analog — pinned to context, structurally read every chat. Operator-only writes (rules are doctrine; mints require operator ratification).

Planned vehicle (not yet active). Per akos-agent-checkpoint-discipline.mdc §Agent self-checkpoint contract. Voluntary pre-flight reasoning audit. Promote to active when self-checkpoint discipline becomes routine (currently used opportunistically).
Mode-bound craft surface (inline-ratify-craft, external-render-craft, etc.). Read-only for Madeira today. Promote to active when Madeira routinely authors new skills (currently only operator does).

Letta MemGPT 'recall memory' analog — searchable conversation history. Citation pattern named in system prompt (cite as [<title>](<uuid>)). Promote to active when Madeira routinely cites past chats for context recall.
